Description: Prevents a column from having a NULL (empty) value.
Ensures all values in the column are distinct.
Uniquely identifies each row (Implicitly NOT NULL + UNIQUE).
Links a column to the Primary Key of another table.
Verifies that values meet a specific logical condition.
Assigns a value if the user provides none.
Ensures if any two rows are compared, they don't overlap (Used for scheduling).
Example Usage: EXCLUDE USING gist (room_id WITH =, reserved_period WITH &&)
